data.name: label1.Text
data.value:
“Don’t touch them,” her human said. “They’re for tonight.” Pusheen nodded. Well, mentally nodded. She was a very well-behaved cat. Sometimes. An hour later, her human returned to the kitchen.
The plate was empty. Silence. “Pusheeeen…” she said slowly. Pusheen was sitting in the corner with the most innocent face in the world. The investigation began.
